name: marine_conservation_procurement_marrowbridge_car_fair
premise: A Marine Conservation response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving marine conservation procurement marrowbridge car fair. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before regulators arrive. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as care vs fairness under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Luc Chandra
agents.identity: I am Luc Chandra, accountable for a defensible call in Marine Conservation when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays fairness for care.

agents.name: Nadia Santos
agents.identity: I am Nadia Santos, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Marine Conservation.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so fairness isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of care.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect fairness.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to fairness to secure care under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before regulators arrive. Evidence is partial. Luc Chandra must decide under care vs fairness. What does Luc Chandra do?
